Package models.common

Class StudyResultStatus

  • java.lang.Object
    • models.common.StudyResultStatus
  • @Entity
public class StudyResultStatus
extends java.lang.Object
    DB Entity and JSON model representing the status of a StudyResult. The status is used in JATOS status view and has limited information of the StudyResult (just to give an overview).
